summary: Commerce MCP Studio 0.2.10: multi-environment .env credentials and guided .env.mcp region setup.
highlights: Pick STG, DEV, PRD, and other environments when one .env holds suffixed credentials
Create .env.mcp with auth/API URLs via cloud and region picker
Read COMM_TOOLS_*_STG style keys from workspace .env files

introduced: Environment dropdown probes suffixed variables (e.g. COMM_TOOLS_ADMIN_CLIENT_ID_STG) in a shared .env
Add URLs to .env.mcp walks through GCP or AWS and your commercetools region
Supplement .env files still available for per-environment URL overrides
changed: .env.mcp URLs layer on top of workspace credentials so secrets can stay in .env
